Although there is no place where Bitcoin is acknowledged a legal currency, there are no major restrictions on the use it. pre: In his speech, Li Keqiang stated that at the Astana Summit in June this year, President Xi Jinping reached important consensus with all parties on consolidating unity and mutual trust, strengthening security cooperation, aligning development strategies, and deepening people-to-people exchanges.
